tasks.title: Add tenant_user_id field to send_queue docs and indexes
tasks.description: Extend send_queue, campaign_contacts, refined_contacts, campaign_stats schemas so every document carries tenant_user_id. Update indexes in server/app/db/mongodb.py to use (tenant_user_id, status, scheduled_for) compound where relevant. Backfill plan: drop-and-recreate acceptable since MCP Mongo is currently single-tenant test data.
acceptance_criteria: Every insert to send_queue, campaign_contacts, refined_contacts, campaign_stats includes tenant_user_id
Compound index (tenant_user_id, status, scheduled_for) exists on send_queue
Queries that were single-tenant now filter by tenant_user_id explicitly

tasks.title: Create global tenant_cursors collection for round-robin
tasks.description: New Mongo collection tenant_cursors holding one document {_id: 'global', last_tenant_id, last_picked_at}. lease_batch atomically advances the cursor via findOneAndUpdate to pick the next tenant. Handle empty-tenant and wrap-around cases. Add sweeper to evict cursor if no activity for 5 min.
acceptance_criteria: tenant_cursors collection created with single _id:global document
Atomic findOneAndUpdate used to advance cursor
Cursor wraps around when reaching end of tenant list

tasks.title: Refactor send_queue_service.lease_batch to tenant-fair selection
tasks.description: Replace current lease_batch in server/app/services/send_queue_service.py (lines 56-90). New flow: read next tenant from tenant_cursors, find up to BATCH_SIZE=8 pending docs for that tenant with scheduled_for<=now, atomic $set lease. If that tenant has no due work, skip and advance cursor, try next tenant (up to N retries before returning empty). Preserves existing lease_expires_at (5 min) semantics.
acceptance_criteria: lease_batch picks a tenant via tenant_cursors before querying send_queue
A whale tenant with 5M rows cannot monopolize lease_batch for more than BATCH_SIZE rows at a time
Empty-tenant skips advance cursor and retry up to N_TENANTS times

tasks.title: Add per-tenant daily cap check in throttle_service
tasks.description: Add try_consume_tenant_daily_cap(tenant_user_id, limit) to server/app/services/throttle_service.py. Uses tenant_stats_daily collection keyed by (tenant_user_id, date_utc) with atomic $inc. Invoked inside lease_batch before leasing. When cap hit, skip tenant and advance cursor. Limit loaded from CRM /api/mcp/tenant-quotas refresh.
acceptance_criteria: try_consume_tenant_daily_cap function exists and returns bool
tenant_stats_daily collection used for atomic counter
lease_batch skips tenant when cap exhausted

tasks.title: Sender pre-send campaign-status sync-check
tasks.description: In server/app/agents/sender.py, before each SendGrid API call, verify the campaign is still in the cached active_campaigns set (refreshed every 60s from /api/mcp/active-work). Skip send and mark send_queue row status='cancelled_by_inactive' if not. Cheap race-condition safety for campaigns that finished between lease and send.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-send check consults in-process active_campaigns set
Skipped sends marked with status='cancelled_by_inactive'
Cache refresh every 60s on active-work poll

tasks.title: Boot-time env-var reading for CPU_VCPU and RAM_MB
tasks.description: Extend server/app/core/settings.py to read CPU_VCPU (float) and RAM_MB (int) env vars with sane defaults (1.0 vCPU, 1024 MB). Validate numeric range. Values populated by ECS task definition or docker-compose run.
acceptance_criteria: Settings.CPU_VCPU and Settings.RAM_MB loaded from env
Defaults to 1.0 vCPU and 1024 MB when unset
Invalid values raise at boot rather than silently falling back

tasks.title: Agent allocation calculator
tasks.description: New module server/app/core/allocation.py with compute_allocation(cpu_vcpu, ram_mb) returning {senders, extraction, hygiene_eligible, daily_capacity}. Formula: senders = min(floor((ram_mb - 200) / 80), floor(cpu_vcpu * 20)) - extraction; extraction = 2 if total >= 20 else 1; hygiene_eligible = total >= 5; daily_capacity = senders * 180 * 8. Must match CRM-side calculator output bit-for-bit.
acceptance_criteria: compute_allocation(1.0, 1024) returns {senders:4, extraction:1, hygiene_eligible:false, daily_capacity:5760}
compute_allocation(4.0, 8192) returns senders=40 or close equivalent
Output matches CRM-side TypeScript calculator for all 7 standard sizes

tasks.title: Apply allocation at supervisor startup
tasks.description: In server/app/main.py (lines 108-120), replace hard-coded sender_agents=4 with compute_allocation result. Spawn senders and extraction agents accordingly. Log the allocation banner at startup for ops visibility.
acceptance_criteria: Sender count derived from compute_allocation at boot
Extraction count 1 or 2 based on allocation
Startup log includes the full allocation summary

tasks.title: Include allocation in register payload
tasks.description: Extend POST /api/mcp/register body so CRM learns container size + allocation up front: cpu_vcpu, ram_mb, sender_agents, extraction_agents, hygiene_eligible, daily_capacity. Used by CRM to seed mcp_worker_instances size and capacity columns.
acceptance_criteria: Register payload includes cpu_vcpu, ram_mb, sender_agents, extraction_agents, daily_capacity
CRM persists these on mcp_worker_instances insert
Hygiene election ignores hygiene_eligible=false containers

tasks.title: Refactor extraction agent to poll /api/mcp/active-work
tasks.description: Change server/app/agents/extraction.py (lines 37-54) to call GET /api/mcp/active-work?since=<ts> instead of /api/mcp/campaigns. Response returns [{tenant_user_id, campaign_id, new_files}]. Iterate across all tenants; per-tenant lease acquires campaign_leases keyed by (tenant_user_id, campaign_id).
acceptance_criteria: Extraction agent polls /api/mcp/active-work every 60s
campaign_leases keyed on (tenant_user_id, campaign_id) tuple
Single container can process campaigns from multiple tenants concurrently

tasks.title: Tenant quotas refresh loop
tasks.description: Add server/app/services/quota_refresher.py that calls GET /api/mcp/tenant-quotas every 15 minutes, caches per-tenant daily_cap, per_hour_cap, plan_tier in-process. Used by throttle_service for cap enforcement. On auth failure, attempt refresh-token flow once before alerting.
acceptance_criteria: Quota cache refreshed every 15 min
throttle_service reads from the cache, never direct HTTP per send
Cache survives CRM transient outages for up to 60 min

tasks.title: Heartbeat payload: container size + uptime
tasks.description: In server/app/agents/heartbeat.py, extend the POST /api/mcp/heartbeat body with: cpu_vcpu, ram_mb, started_at_iso, uptime_seconds, senders_running, extraction_running, campaigns_in_flight[], tenants_served_count, extraction_queue_depth. Matches the richer schema CRM expects for the Fleet Dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: Heartbeat body includes cpu_vcpu, ram_mb, started_at_iso, uptime_seconds
senders_running and extraction_running counts reflect live agent states
campaigns_in_flight is a deduped list of campaign_ids currently being processed

tasks.title: Per-tenant backlog counters in heartbeat metrics
tasks.description: Compute per-tenant send_queue pending counts and include in heartbeat metrics.per_tenant_backlog = {tenant_user_id: count}. Aggregation runs every 30s cached. Used by CRM Fleet Manager to detect unfair starvation patterns.
acceptance_criteria: metrics.per_tenant_backlog populated each heartbeat
Aggregation query uses existing (status, scheduled_for) index
Empty tenants omitted from the map

tasks.title: Shard-key field on multi-tenant collection writes
tasks.description: Add shard_key to every document inserted/upserted into send_queue, campaign_contacts, refined_contacts, campaign_stats. Helper: sha256(str(tenant_user_id))[:16]. Applied in server/app/db/mongodb.py or at each service-layer insert. Future-proofs sharding with zero backfill when Mongo shard is enabled.
acceptance_criteria: Every multi-tenant collection insert includes shard_key field
shard_key derived deterministically from tenant_user_id
At least one compound index prefixes on shard_key for shard-aware queries

tasks.title: Streaming JSON parser via ijson
tasks.description: Replace json.loads(file.read()) in server/app/services/contact_parser.py:80 with ijson.items(file, 'item') for JSON files. Add ijson to requirements.txt. Ensures 500MB contact-list JSON does not OOM a 1GB container.
acceptance_criteria: ijson used for JSON contact parsing
500MB test JSON file completes ingestion in nano-size container without OOM
CSV and XLSX paths unchanged
